final:
module sram_16bit (  
    input clk,  
    input we,  
    input [3:0] addr,  
    input [15:0] din,  
    output reg [15:0] dout  
);  
    reg [15:0] storage [0:15]; // 16x16-bit storage  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (we) begin  
            storage[addr] <= din; // Write to storage  
        end  
        dout <= storage[addr]; // Read from storage  
    end  
endmodule
